items.name: contact-01
items.title: Contact Page
items.description: A contact page block with name, email, subject, message form and optional contact info sidebar.

items.name: dashboard-01
items.title: Dashboard
items.description: A SaaS dashboard block with KPI cards, chart placeholders, recent activity table, and quick actions.

items.name: empty-state-01
items.title: Empty State
items.description: An empty state block with icon, title, description, and optional action buttons. Use when no data exists.

items.name: error-state-01
items.title: Error State
items.description: An error state block with icon, title, message, retry button, and optional expandable error details. Supports card, page, and toast variants.

items.name: faq-01
items.title: FAQ Section
items.description: An FAQ section block with accordion Q&A items and optional search/filter functionality.

items.name: forgot-password-01
items.title: Forgot Password
items.description: A forgot password page with email input, validation, and success confirmation state.

items.name: hero-01
items.title: Hero Section
items.description: A marketing hero section block with headline, subtext, CTA buttons, and optional image placeholder.

items.name: loading-state-01
items.title: Loading State
items.description: A loading/skeleton block with various skeleton shapes (text, card, table, avatar) and optional progress indicator.

items.name: login-01
items.title: Sign In Page
items.description: A sign-in page block with email/password form, social login options, remember me, and forgot password link.

items.name: login-02
items.title: Alternative Sign In
items.description: An email-first sign-in page with multi-step password flow or magic-link flow.

items.name: pricing-01
items.title: Pricing Page
items.description: A pricing page block with monthly/yearly billing toggle, 3 plan tiers, feature comparison, and CTA buttons.

items.name: profile-01
items.title: User Profile
items.description: A user profile page with personal info form, notification toggles, account settings, and danger zone.

items.name: settings-01
items.title: Settings Page
items.description: A tabbed settings page with General, Security, Appearance, Notifications, and Billing sections.

items.name: signup-01
items.title: Sign Up Page
items.description: A registration page block with name, email, password fields, terms acceptance, and social sign-up options.

items.name: verify-email-01
items.title: Email Verification
items.description: An email verification page with 6-digit code input, auto-advance, paste support, resend with countdown timer, and success/error states.

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data Table
items.description: A feature-rich data table component with sorting, filtering, pagination, column visibility, row selection, infinite scroll, and server-side support.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: Alert component for displaying contextual feedback messages.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: Alert Dialog
items.description: A dialog component for displaying alerts.

items.name: sheet
items.title: Sheet
items.description: A StyleX Sheet component built on Base UI Dialog primitives.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: A simple styled table component with column definitions and row rendering.
